title: Update GoJS License Key for Version 3.1
description:
## Action
Update the GoJS license key for app.datatoolspro.com to the new key for version 3.1. The key must execute before the first Diagram is created.

## Key Details
- Order number: 1N12218
- Domain: app.datatoolspro.com
- Valid for GoJS version 3.1.*
- New key required when upgrading to 3.2 or 4.0
acceptance_criteria: GoJS 3.1 license key is active in production
ux_changes: Removed evaluation watermark with updated license key.
implementation_notes: GoJS 3.1 license key applied. Valid for all 3.1.* patch versions. Must be renewed for 3.2 or 4.0 upgrades.
comment_summary: Developer applied the key to production.
